ol.li: Spill Protocol: Must issue writeback before reg reuse.
Metadata: Must sync 32-byte descriptor before return.
Alignment: Stack slots must be 8-byte aligned (x86_64).

ul.li: Current State: Physical register pool is completely exhausted.
Requirement: Selection of a spill victim to vacate a register.
Algorithm scans active set for register with highest next_use_pc.
V_0 in rax is chosen (Next use at PC 1024).
CPU context must be saved to memory before register overwrite.
Emit MOV instruction: store rax to stack frame offset.
Location for V_0 updated to Stack Slot.
rax state cleared to AVAILABLE for the new allocator request.
V_new is assigned to the now-vacant rax.
The JIT compiler proceeds to emit the load for V_new.
